Our Story

Creating Magic
for Every Occasion

Welcome to Magic Moments by Venetia — your go-to event decorator in Rock Springs, Wyoming. What started as a passion for bringing joy to celebrations has grown into a full-service event styling business, creating unforgettable experiences for every occasion.

From stunning balloon garlands and arches to complete table setups with lights, linens, and centerpieces, Venetia handles every detail so you can focus on making memories. Every event is treated with personalized care and creative vision.

🎈
Custom Balloon Art Garlands, arches, columns, walls & bouquets
✨
Full Event Styling Tables, lights, linens & centerpieces
🚗
Free Delivery Within 30 miles of Rock Springs
🎁
Setup & Teardown Always included at no extra cost
What We Offer

Our Services & Pricing

Every celebration is unique. Browse our starting prices below, or reach out for a custom package tailored to your vision.

🎈
Small Garland

Approx. 5 ft — perfect as a cash & carry accent piece for any celebration.

$85
🎉
Medium Garland

Approx. 10 ft — a lush, full garland that commands attention at any event.

$150
🎊
Big Garland

Approx. 15 ft — dramatic coverage that transforms any space into a celebration.

$180
🎀
Chiara Garland

Includes Chiara wall — an elegant, full backdrop display for photo-worthy moments.

$250
🏰
Full Round Arch

A stunning full balloon arch — the perfect frame for entrances, ceremonies & photos.

$275 + $100 security deposit
Full Square Arch

Bold geometric balloon arch — a modern statement piece for any occasion.

$275 + $100 security deposit
🏛️
Balloon Columns

Foil or plain topper — elegant columns that anchor entrances and photo backdrops.

$75 + $20 security deposit
✨
Balloon Wall

A full statement wall of balloons — the ultimate backdrop for photos and events.

$450 + $100 security deposit
💐
Balloon Bouquets

Beautiful balloon bouquets in any color palette — perfect for tables or gift giving.

$30 – $75
🪄
Table Setup

Full table styling including lights, tablecloths, centerpieces, and more. Every detail handled so you can focus on your guests. Setup and teardown always included.

Pricing Per Request Contact us for a custom quote

Need something larger or unique? We offer custom packages for weddings, corporate events, and large celebrations. Let's chat ›
